docs.title: Welcome to ProCode
docs.content:
Welcome to ProCode EduPulse

Our platform is designed to take you from a passive watcher to an active, job-ready developer. Here you will find all the documentation needed to navigate the platform.

The ProCode Methodology

We believe in learning by doing. Every course is packed with interactive challenges. Pass the tests, clear the levels, and watch your portfolio grow.

docs.title: How to Use the Editor
docs.content:
The Integrated Code Editor

Our browser-based editor is powered by CodeMirror 6, offering syntax highlighting and live previews.

  • Run Code: Click the Play button or hit Ctrl+Enter
  • Copy Code: Click the Copy button or hit Ctrl+Shift+C
  • Reset: Stuck? Hit reset to restore the starter code.

docs.title: Community Guidelines
docs.content:
Be Respectful

We are a community of learners. Answer questions patiently, avoid sharing full challenge solutions directly, and use the AI hints when completely stuck!

docs.title: How to Contribute
docs.content:
Open Source

ProCode EduPulse is an open-source project. If you find a bug or want to translate a lesson, visit our GitHub page, read the CONTRIBUTING.md file, and open a Pull Request!
